# arifOS APPS — Live Runtime Contract
# Location: https://arifos.arif-fazil.com/llms.txt
# Version: 2026.3.28.1
# Authority: Muhammad Arif bin Fazil (888 Judge)
# Status: LIVE_AUDITED
# Last Audited: 2026-03-28

---

## WHAT THIS DOCUMENT TRACKS

This file describes the live arifOS MCP runtime that the docs site points to today.
It is based on a runtime audit of the public endpoints, not on historical release notes.
`llms.json` is the canonical machine-readable contract. This `llms.txt` file is its human-readable derived snapshot and must remain in sync.

Runtime root: https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com
MCP endpoint: https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com/mcp
Tools index: https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com/tools
Health: https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com/health

Transport: streamable-http
Protocol version: 2025-11-25

---

## CURRENT PUBLIC SURFACE

- Publicly discoverable tools: 23
- Internally loaded tools reported by service root and health: 39
- Runtime version: 2026.3.28.1
- Active public runtime domain: arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com
- Legacy public docs references to aaamcp.arif-fazil.com and aaa.arif-fazil.com/mcp are stale

---

## TOOL GROUPS

### Session and audit

- `init_anchor`
- `vault_ledger`
- `check_vital`
- `audit_rules`
- `vault_seal`
- `verify_vault_ledger`

### Mind and reasoning

- `agi_mind`
- `agi_reason`
- `agi_reflect`
- `apex_judge`

### Heart and alignment

- `asi_heart`
- `asi_critique`
- `asi_simulate`

### Reality and grounding

- `physics_reality`
- `reality_compass`
- `reality_atlas`
- `search_reality`
- `ingest_evidence`

### Ops and engineering

- `engineering_memory`
- `math_estimator`
- `code_engine`
- `architect_registry`
- `agentzero_engineer`

---

## LIVE TOOL NOTES

- `init_anchor` is the unified constitutional session tool.
- `vault_ledger` is the primary permanent decision and integrity interface.
- `agi_mind` and `asi_heart` are the current top-level reasoning and safety tools.
- `engineering_memory`, `math_estimator`, and `code_engine` require valid mode and payload combinations; they can return `ok: true` while still reporting `status: ERROR`, which is a runtime contract issue observed in the 2026-03-28 audit.

---

## AUDIT SNAPSHOT — 2026-03-28

Public endpoint checks:

- `https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com` returned `200`
- `https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com/mcp` returned `200`
- `https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com/health` returned `200`
- `https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com/sse` returned `404`
- `https://aaa.arif-fazil.com/mcp` returned `404`
- `https://aaamcp.arif-fazil.com` did not resolve

Tool-call probe:

- 23 of 23 publicly listed tools responded over JSON-RPC
- Most returned `SEAL` and `SUCCESS`
- Some aliases route to canonical tools, for example `vault_seal` to `vault_ledger`
- Three contract anomalies were observed during invalid-input probes:
  - `engineering_memory`
  - `math_estimator`
  - `code_engine`

These returned a payload-level failure while the top-level response still advertised `ok: true`

---
